title: Spicy Crispy Garlic Syrian Crumble
description: An adventurous take on a classic Syrian dish featuring black pepper and garlic, this recipe is egg-free-friendly and perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cups all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Use whole wheat or almond flour for a healthier option.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). In a large bowl, mix flour and black pepper.
Add chopped roasted garlic and olive oil. Knead dough until it comes together into a ball.
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface until about 1/4 inch thick.
Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters or knife. Place on baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
